title: TransparentArmors
description: Adds transparent Armor to every armor type to see everyone's skin
body:
![Textures](https://i.ibb.co/mFPDFx0/Sprite-0003.png)

**Also new Chainmail (Leather Coming Soon!)

NEW TEXTURES BY [Crownsheep](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/crownsheep/projects)

If you find any bugs please report!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BZptg5qcW1g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**This is Transparent Armor a simple yet beautiful mod, It adds transparent armors to all armor types meaning you can see your skin while wearing Armor!**

![Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/fpyQbx2/2024-04-12-18-41-58.png)

**You can always craft it back to normal armor by just putting it into the crafting table!**
